core_mechanism: Estimation of an intractable global normalizing constant (partition function) by decomposing it into a telescoping product of tractable intermediate ratios relative to a reference state, assembled incrementally by adding one sub-unit at a time and reusing a library of precomputed, memoized per-sub-unit contributions.
brief_reason: The abstract estimates a molecule's absolute free energy / partition function by 'staging' the calculation via fragment-by-fragment growth from a reference system, pre-calculating and re-using per-fragment configurations and interaction tables so each new molecule reuses cached building-block contributions.
